---
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  include:
    categories: "Miniproof"
  exclude:
    draft: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
# Hi! Nice to meet you!

Welcome to my personal website!
:::

## Resources

Papers:

| Title | Authors | Status | More |
|-------------------|------------------|------------------|------------------|
| Bayesian Conformal Prediction as a Decision Risk Problem | [F. Wu](https://fanyi-kaitlyn-wu.github.io/), **V. Lohmanova**, [S. Kaski](https://kaski-lab.com/), [M. Caprio](https://michelecaprio.wixsite.com/caprio) | [Preprint](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.03331) | [Poster](more/WUML2026_poster.pdf) | 
| Foundational aspects of Imprecise Probabilistic Conformal Prediction (IPCP) | **V. Lohmanova** | Under review | [*CantinaRoll*](https://youtu.be/eMffCtOeigI?si=z1LklAOwC_gTiJGQ) |


Here are some presentations I had given:

| Name | Event | Language | Link |
|-------------------|------------------|------------------|------------------|
| The game of mind and dice: Uncertainty Quantification | MIMUC 2026 | 🇬🇧 | [presentation](talks/MIMUC2026/_site/index.html) |
| Matemātiska analīze varbūtību teorijā, statisikā un datu zinātnē | LSMAT diskusiju klubs 2025 | 🇱🇻 | [presentation](talks/LSMAT/LSMAT_lekcija.html) |
| Idealised ruler and collapsing compass: Euclidean geometry | MIMUC 2025 | 🇬🇧 | [presentation](/talks/MIMUC_presentation.pdf) |

## Science related blog posts
